decisions.rationale: Valid coverage-artifact gap: files_changed lists ResourceDetailPopup.tsx, Paths.tsx, routes.ts, and the coverage JSON but omits PathsResourcesPanel.tsx, ResourceCard.tsx, and pathsResourcesApi.ts even though preflight.mapped_target_files and criteria_audit AC-2/AC-3 evidence cite all three as primary deliverables. Brownfield triage confirms all three target_files exist, are fully implemented (pinned crisis section, resource RG + fetchResources, View Resource handoff), and criteria_audit/functional_audit/ui_evidence all pass at 100%. Omission is audit traceability housekeeping only — it does not reduce coverage_pct, fail any AC, or block downstream PATHS-05 depends_on on resource-view-btn popup wiring. Expand files_changed on the next coverage pass; no source rewrite required for advance.

IR re-read confirms Group_card_ specifies padding 24px on all sides (ir/slices/styles.json). bubbleStyle(Group_card_) in frontend/src/styles/bubble-styles.css already maps that 24px padding; PathsResourcesPanel PinnedCrisisCard and ResourceCard also apply Tailwind p-5 (20px), which may override the DS class via cascade — a 4px delta. However Group_card_ is applied via bubbleStyle + data-style-ref on both components, review ui_evidence for Group_card_ passes, and the p-5 stack is shared repo-wide (PathCard, DashboardChatPreviewCard, etc.). PATHS-04 ACs require Group_card_ styling, not explicit pixel padding in acceptance criteria; downstream PATHS-05 depends on popup handoff, not card inset. Defer removing redundant p-5 or consolidating Group_card_ padding across cards as optional DS-01 polish.

Coverage functional_verification reuses FV-4 label from PATHS-01 tab chrome while review independently derived FV-1..3 from this item's ACs (tab gating, fetchResources RG load, View Resource popup). Independent functional_audit FV-1..3 all pass with correct evidence on PathsResourcesPanel, pathsResourcesApi, ResourceCard, and Paths.tsx popup state. ID cross-item confusion is coverage-artifact labeling only — behavior is verified and AC-3 popup handoff is satisfied. Align functional_verification row IDs with item-specific checks on the next coverage pass; no source rewrite required for advance.

summary: 0 fix_now, 3 defer, 0 accept. Advance OK — review ok=true, coverage 100%, no blockers, all ACs and ui_evidence pass. Deferred: C-1 coverage files_changed completeness for PathsResourcesPanel.tsx, ResourceCard.tsx, pathsResourcesApi.ts (artifact hygiene); C-2 Group_card_ redundant p-5 vs bubbleStyle 24px padding (DS-01 card-padding polish); C-3 functional_verification FV ID alignment with item-specific checks (coverage labeling hygiene).
